---
pagetitle: "Jared Black"
description: "Assistant Professor of Health Economics, Army–Baylor Graduate Program"
---

```{=html}
<div class="cols">
  <div class="col-photo">
    <img src="img/portrait.jpg" alt="Jared Black">
  </div>
  <div class="col-text">
    <p>I'm Jared Black, assistant professor of health economics in the Army&ndash;Baylor Graduate Program (<a href="https://hankamer.baylor.edu/army-baylor">MHA/MBA</a>).</p>

    <h2>research</h2>
    <p>I study health economics and public policy in healthcare systems, using empirical (causal and predictive) tools from econometrics, statistics, and data science.</p>
    <p>A few current projects:</p>
    <div class="arrow">
    <ul>
      <li>Psychedelic Decriminalization Effects on Emergency Care</li>
      <li>Inpatient Outcomes After Psychedelic Decriminalization</li>
      <li>More Ado about Nothing? The Financial Effects of Hospital Data Breaches</li>
      <li>ElectionGPT</li>
      <li>&ldquo;Ask an Economist&rdquo; <a href="https://chatgpt.com/g/g-GJeexE26G-ask-an-economist">GPT</a></li>
    </ul>
    </div>

    <h2>more</h2>
    <p>Feel free to explore, or <a href="mailto:jared_black@baylor.edu">get in touch</a>.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```
